title: All The Horror Mods
description: This modpack includes good horror mods (no dwellers)
body:
# All The Horror Mods 

 is a chilling Minecraft modpack crafted for fans of all things eerie, creepy, and downright terrifying. Dive into a world teeming with supernatural threats, twisted dimensions, haunted structures, and horrifying creatures lurking around every dark corner. Whether you're exploring cursed forests, surviving relentless nights, or uncovering ancient, forbidden secrets, this pack will keep you on edge.

 Featuring a wide variety of horror-themed mods — from jump scares and psychological horror to occult magic and grotesque monsters — All The Horror Mods delivers a heart-pounding survival experience like no other. Note: This pack does not include Dwellers.

Perfect for Halloween playthroughs, spooky server nights, or anyone who wants to turn Minecraft into a full-blown nightmare.

Enter... if you dare.
